## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **Browser / OS:** (e.g. Chrome 124 / macOS 14)
- **Version:** (app version or commit SHA)
- **Schema size:** (approximate number of classes/slots, if relevant)

## Additional context

Paste any console errors, screenshots, or relevant log output here.
